title: Dover Announces The 2022 Dover Scholarship Winners And Expands Program
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , April 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV) today announced the names of 30 winners of its Dover Foundation Scholars Program.

title: Dover Corporation (DOV) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Dover Corporation (DOV) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.26% and 1.13%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Dover Reports First Quarter 2022 Results
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , April 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV), a diversified global manufacturer, announced its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2022.

title: Rotary's New Wide Smartlift Designed to Help Car Dealerships and Shops Future Proof Business
text: Versatile Lift Works with Wide Range of Vehicles, including Electric Vehicles and Exotics DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , April 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Rotary, part of Vehicle Service Group (VSG) and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the launch of the Rotary Wide Smartlift®, offering forward-thinking dealerships and repair shops a versatile lift that works with both current and next-generation vehicles.

title: Destaco Expands Its Manual Clamp Product Offerings
text: New and upgraded models offer more flexibility for users in workholding applications DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , April 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ – Destaco, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV), announced that it continues to expand the options within its Manual Clamp product family through the creation of new models and the upgrade of existing versions.

title: SWEP Presented with Trane Technologies' 2021 Continuous Improvement Award
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , April 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- SWEP, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV), recently received the 2021 Continuous Improvement Award from Trane Technologies, a world leader in air conditioning systems, services and solutions.

title: Dover Fueling Solutions Partners with Global Technical Services to Offer DX Wetstock in Egypt
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , April 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover Fueling Solutions ("DFS"), a part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global provider of advanced customer-focused technologies, services and solutions in the fuel and convenience retail industries, today announced that it has expanded its agreement with Global Technical Services ("GTS") to include the provision of its DX Wetstock management services, an end-to-end fuel management solution, to the Egyptian markets.

title: Dover Announces First Quarter 2022 Earnings Release Date, Conference Call and Webcast
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , April 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV) announced today that it will release first quarter 2022 earnings at approximately 6:00 a.m.

title: Dover (DOV) Wraps Up the Buyout of Electric RCV Bodies
text: Dover's (DOV) latest buyout will help the Environmental Solutions Group (ESG) business to capitalize on the growing demand for the adoption of electric refuse collection vehicles (RCVs).

title: Dover Completes Acquisition of Electric Refuse Collection Vehicle Intellectual Property Portfolio
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , April 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV) today announced that it has completed the acquisition of certain intellectual property from Boivin Evolution Inc. ("BEV") related to electrically-powered refuse collection vehicle ("RCV") bodies.
